metadata.name: Provide Product Training Materials to a Retailer

description: A retailer's staff needs access to training materials for a wholesaler's products.

nodes.task_description: Receive a request from a retailer for training materials.
Provide the retailer with a link to the online training portal, which contains videos and guides.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sends the retailer the link to the training resources.

nodes.task_description: Set up user accounts for the retailer's staff so they can access the portal.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully creates the user accounts.
